sections.paragraph:
ϰλητός, ή, όν [καλέω] invited, called in NT w. focus on special privilege in the divine realm

—a. in imagery of invitation to a meal Mt 22:14; cp. 20:16 v.l.

—b. without imagery of a meal: of Paul’s privileged status as apostle Ro 1:1; 1 Cor 1:1; of anyone privileged to share in divine blessing, esp. relating to Jesus Christ Ro 1:6f; 8:28; 1 Cor 1:2, 24; Jd 1; Rv 17:14.
